description: Customize the visual appearance of specific tags and build a dedicated sidebar dashboard for issue tracking. Configure the 'bug' tag with background color '#d73a4a' and icon '$:/core/images/warning'. Configure the 'enhancement' tag with background color '#a2eeef' and icon '$:/core/images/star-filled'. Configure the 'documentation' tag with background color '#0075ca' and icon '$:/core/images/info-button'. Create a tiddler titled 'Triage Dashboard' tagged with '$:/tags/SideBar' and add a 'caption' field with the value 'Triage'. The dashboard must contain three sections with the following headers and content: 'Critical Bugs' (listing tiddlers tagged with both 'bug' and 'critical'), 'Enhancements' (listing tiddlers tagged with 'enhancement'), and 'Documentation' (listing tiddlers tagged with 'documentation'). Ensure all changes are saved.
